body:
## Overview

Phase 1 TUI implementation complete. All acceptance criteria met.

## Parent Issue
Blocks: #89 (Product Review: Add TUI)
Blocked By: PR #91 (documentation foundation)

## Scope - Phase 1 Implementation ✅ COMPLETE

### 1. Spike/Prototype ✅
- [x] Create minimal Textual prototype with dummy data
- [x] Verify Textual compatibility with Python 3.11+
- [x] Build single panel (crawl phase) with mock progress
- [x] Test async/await patterns with Textual

### 2. StateManager Implementation ✅
- [x] Implement StateManager class (src/tui/models/state.py)
- [x] Add phase tracking (idle → running → paused → completed/error)
- [x] Add metrics accumulation (jobs, tokens, cost, items/sec)
- [x] Add top matches calculation
- [x] Document thread-safety constraints (NOT thread-safe, requires @work exclusive)

### 3. Panels Implementation ✅
- [x] CrawlPanel (progress bar, job count, tokens/sec, eta)
- [x] PreprocessPanel (token counting, chunk stats)
- [x] AssessPanel (assessment progress, top matches visible)
- [x] ExportPanel (report generation status)
- [x] BasePanelWidget (shared layout, styling)

### 4. Dashboard Integration ✅
- [x] Implement Dashboard (main Textual App, src/tui/dashboard.py)
- [x] Keyboard navigation (Tab to switch panels, q to quit)
- [x] Layout (sidebar for phase selector, main area for current panel)
- [x] Cost tracker display (live token + USD accumulation)

### 5. CLI Integration ✅
- [x] Update cli.py to use TUI dashboard for all command
- [x] Add --no-tui flag to preserve text output (backward compat)
- [x] Route crawl/preprocess/assess phases through StateManager
- [x] Connect existing progress callbacks to StateManager updates

### 6. Testing & Documentation ✅
- [x] Unit tests for StateManager (progress, metrics, top matches)
- [x] Integration tests for StateManager + panels
- [x] Dashboard smoke tests (renders, keyboard works)
- [x] Manual testing: dashboard metrics accurate
- [x] Update README with TUI usage and --no-tui flag

## Delivery
- PR #107: Phase 1 TUI foundation dashboard
- 21 new files (TUI module + tests)
- 52 new tests, 87.82% coverage
- 395/395 tests passing (no regressions)

## Next: Phase 2
Integrate actual crawl/preprocess/assess/export logic with StateManager for live workflow execution.
title: Phase 1: Implement TUI Foundation Dashboard (Sub-issue of #89) ✅ COMPLETE
